title: Assembly struct layout inference
description: Infer candidate struct fields by tracing a pointer register through generated assembly.
limitations: Field names are placeholders; inferred offsets and access sizes need source/header confirmation.
Pointer-register selection is caller-provided and should come from objdiff, local asm, or register-flow evidence.

usage.agent_guidance: Use when asm/register evidence identifies a pointer register and field offsets need to be grounded before source edits.
